svg.text: hookcensus — every install script, classified, allowlist ready to commit
$ hookcensus list
hookcensus: 8 package(s) with lifecycle scripts out of 9 scanned
ALLOW better-sqlite3@11.3.0 install native-build compiles the SQLite native addon
DENY core-js@3.38.1 postinstall funding only prints a funding banner
ALLOW esbuild@0.21.5 postinstall binary-fetch the platform binary is load-bearing
ALLOW fsevents@2.3.3 install native-build macOS watcher addon
DENY husky@4.3.8 postinstall dev-hooks git hooks, dev-repo only
ALLOW native-keychain@1.4.2 install native-build binding.gyp — synthesized node-gyp rebuild
ALLOW sharp@0.33.4 (lockfile) binary-fetch fetches libvips (not installed)
REVIEW tiny-notifier@2.0.1 postinstall script-run runs scripts/setup.js — read it first
allow 5 · deny 2 · review 1
$ hookcensus emit pnpm-workspace --write
created pnpm-workspace.yaml: 5 allowed, 2 denied; 1 review package(s) left out
— decide them or pass --include-review
$ hookcensus check # in CI — nothing undecided slips through
hookcensus check: FAIL — allowlist config has drifted.
undecided (1) — in the tree, not in any allowlist:
tiny-notifier (2.0.1) — suggested verdict: review
# read its scripts/setup.js, re-emit with --include-review → check: OK, exit 0
